[

        "SET ENABLE_TWO_PHASE_AGG TO FALSE",

match_exprs
            .into_iter()
            .reduce(|l, r| BinaryOp {
                left: Box::new(l),
                op: BinaryOperator::And,
                right: Box::new(r),
            }).expect
bind_data_type(&c.data_type.expect("data type should not be none")).unwrap

diff
        .iter_all_changes()
        .filter_map(|change| match change.tag() {
            ChangeTag::Delete => Some(format!("-{}", change)),
            ChangeTag::Insert => Some(format!("+{}", change)),
            ChangeTag::Equal => None,
        }).collect

client
            .simple_query(
                "SELECT mv.name \
                 FROM rw_catalog.rw_materialized_views mv \
                 JOIN rw_catalog.rw_schemas s ON mv.schema_id = s.id \
                 WHERE s.name = 'public' \
                   AND NOT EXISTS ( \
                         SELECT 1 FROM rw_catalog.rw_depend d WHERE d.refobjid = mv.id \
                       ) \
                 ORDER BY mv.name",
            )
            .await.unwrap

client
                .simple_query(
                    "SELECT mv.name \
                     FROM rw_catalog.rw_materialized_views mv \
                     JOIN rw_catalog.rw_schemas s ON mv.schema_id = s.id \
                     WHERE s.name = 'public'",
                )
                .await.unwrap
